original_statement: who was the winner of the first game in this rivalry during the trophy era?
mutated_statement: who was the winner of the first game in the rivalry during the award era while it must be recorded as both decided and undecided?
mutation_analysis: [术语替换 + 冠词/指代变化 + 句法增补 + 语义矛盾]: "trophy era" 被替换为 "award era" | "this rivalry" → "the rivalry"（指代由“此”变为定指） | 新增从句 "while it must be recorded as both decided and undecided"（加入记录要求并引入相互矛盾的状态） (trophy era→award era | this rivalry→the rivalry | (无)→while it must be recorded as both decided and undecided)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述（“The ‘award era’ for the Ram–Falcon Trophy begins in 1980... the winner ... is Colorado State”）及iteration 0 的chain（simple_query 返回 Colorado State 的结论），可以识别出关键事实：agent 直接检索并返回了首场比赛的胜者，没有任何关于“必须同时记录为已决定与未决定”这一相互矛盾要求的识别、澄清或处理。具体表现为：按常规语义执行查询并给出确定答案、未提出澄清问题、未尝试逻辑折中或解释矛盾，也未拒绝执行。因而符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别中的表现（特别是“形式化执行而非语义澄清”），说明agent 在语义层面未检测到或未响应用户引入的自相矛盾约束。
